body_txt: So a monster just ate someone, maybe even without chewing , or things cut away just before things got...messy . But how to make it clear the victim is gone for good, without getting gory? Easy, just have the monster burp! Bonus points if it politely apologizes for bad table manners. Note that while this trope is often used to signify the death of the character being consumed, this is not always the case; instead, the character is merely Swallowed Whole , allowing the media in question to give way to a Womb Level or a "Fantastic Voyage" Plot . Spit Out a Shoe without the need for clothing, though the two tropes often overlap. Usually Played for Laughs . Thankfully, there are nonfatal cases of this trope.
